name: TestIso11783IL_OPSetStringValue
title: TestIso11783IL_OPSetStringValue
syntax: long TestIso11783IL_OPSetStringValue( dbNode node, dword objectID, char stringValue[] );
description: The functions set the string value of an object in the object pool. The object must exist in the object pool and must support a string value. If the Object Pool API is active, a Change String Value command is sent to the Virtual Terminal. This can be suppressed with Bit 0 in options.
Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous.
Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

parameters.name: node
parameters.description: Simulation node to apply the function.
